falsifiers.claim: gaze<->EEG sync drift stays within 100 ms across a session
falsifiers.fail_threshold: max-min(browser_ts - server_lsl) > 100 ms within one 20-min block
falsifiers.detection: analyze_session.py reads BolyMarkers payload (browser_ts vs server_lsl) and computes drift histogram
falsifiers.consequence_if_fires: OKN decoder timing assumption invalidated; switch alignment unreliable; protocol unusable until time-sync redesigned (e.g., direct LSL push from a desktop bridge instead of HTTP)

falsifiers.claim: webcam framerate stays >=25 Hz under typical room lighting for entire 20-min block
falsifiers.detection: count gaze;... markers per second offline; flag if 5-min rolling mean < 25
falsifiers.consequence_if_fires: below Boly minimum spec (30 Hz nominal, our budget allows -5 Hz); affected blocks must be discarded; if persistent, hardware path (Pupil Core) required

falsifiers.claim: OKN decoder achieves >=60% accuracy on synthetic test data
falsifiers.consequence_if_fires: decoder logic broken; pipeline cannot proceed; root-cause + retest required

falsifiers.claim: OpenBCI Cyton+Daisy holds <30 kOhm impedance on >=12/16 channels for 60 min
falsifiers.fail_threshold: >4/16 channels exceed 30 kOhm at any impedance check
falsifiers.detection: OpenBCI GUI impedance panel during electrode setup; verify pre-block-A and pre-block-B
falsifiers.consequence_if_fires: channel count below pilot minimum; either re-prep electrodes (extra ~10 min) or accept reduced channel count with explicit Limitations note

falsifiers.claim: GazeCloudAPI non-commercial license permits academic-research / pre-publication use without paywall
falsifiers.fail_threshold: ToS or service behavior blocks our use case (rate-limit, paywall, or explicit research exclusion clause)
falsifiers.detection: manual ToS review at signup; runtime monitoring for HTTP 429 or auth errors in browser console
falsifiers.consequence_if_fires: must escalate: (a) Pupil Core ~$2-3k purchase, OR (b) GazeRecorder local SDK (Windows-only, requires VM/dual-boot on Mac), OR (c) accept WebGazer.js as overt-only fallback (FAILs Boly OKN spec; downgrade scope)
